message: HTTP grant builder now rejects comma-delimited or malformed individual host/scheme entries, and direct grant validation checks parsed allowlist tokens for empty/malformed hosts and unsupported schemes. Added focused SafeNetworkGrantValidationTests. Validation: dotnet test tests/SafeIR.Tests/SafeIR.Tests.csproj --filter FullyQualifiedName~SafeNetwork; ./scripts/check-csharp-file-lines.ps1.
